title: Paraprasophyllum helophilum

intro: Paraprasophyllum helophilum, commonly known as the swamp greenhood, is a terrestrial orchid native to Australia. The swamp greenhood has been traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various health conditions, including respiratory issues and inflammation, due to its potential antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The bioactive constituents of this plant include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and alkaloids, which contribute to its medicinal effects. Swamp greenhood is typically used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, with the most common forms being fluid extracts and dried plant material.
